headline: Nvidia Q1 earnings: The 3 things this analyst will be watching

AI chip leader Nvidia (NVDA) will be reporting its first quarter earnings this Wednesday, May 20.

headline: How The Broadcom (AVGO) Investment Story Is Shifting With AI Hopes And Fresh Concerns
summary: Broadcom’s fair value estimate has shifted slightly from US$475.49 to US$476.78, reflecting only a modest adjustment to where analysts see the stock’s long term potential. This small move sits against a backdrop of rising and trimmed price targets, as bullish analysts lean into AI related semiconductor demand, while more cautious voices question valuations and competitive positioning. As you read on, you will see how these conflicting calls shape the evolving narrative and what to watch as...
